query:
UPDATE island_guides 
SET attractions = JSON_ARRAY(
  JSON_OBJECT(
    'name', 'Main Beach',
    'description', 'The primary beach area featuring pristine white sand and crystal-clear turquoise waters. Perfect for swimming, sunbathing, and water sports.',
    'location', 'Coastal area'
  ),
  JSON_OBJECT(
    'name', 'Local Market',
    'description', 'Experience authentic local culture at the island market where residents sell fresh produce, fish, and traditional crafts. Great for cultural immersion.',
    'location', 'Town center'
  ),
  JSON_OBJECT(
    'name', 'Mosque',
    'description', 'Beautiful local mosque showcasing traditional Maldivian architecture. Visitors can observe from outside during non-prayer times and learn about local religious practices.',
    'location', 'Island center'
  ),
  JSON_OBJECT(
    'name', 'Coral Reef',
    'description', 'Vibrant coral reef system surrounding the island with abundant marine life including tropical fish, sea turtles, and rays. Excellent for snorkeling and diving.',
    'location', 'Offshore'
  ),
  JSON_OBJECT(
    'name', 'Local Café',
    'description', 'Authentic local café serving traditional Maldivian cuisine, fresh seafood, and tropical fruits. A perfect spot to experience local flavors and hospitality.',
    'location', 'Town area'
  )
)
WHERE attractions IS NULL OR attractions = ''
